title: Obsidian develops a new Fallout after the cancellation of Avowed 2
summary: According to multiple reports, Microsoft has given the green light to a new Fallout RPG by the creators of New Vegas, while the Avowed sequel was shelved amid a wave of layoffs.

title: Microsoft faces harsh criticism over massive Xbox layoffs; id Software and Bethesda dramatically reduced
summary: More than 3,200 employees have been laid off, id Software reportedly lost half of its workforce, and unions along with Bernie Sanders condemn the company's management.

title: Mario Kart Tour will permanently shut down in September 2026
summary: Nintendo announces the end of service for the free-to-play mobile game, which will no longer be available at the end of September.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced triumphs in reviews and outsells Shadows in early sales
summary: The remake of Ubisoft's classic pirate game receives positive reviews and already shows better numbers on Steam than its predecessor Assassin's Creed Shadows.

title: Square Enix to shut down mobile game Final Fantasy 7 Ever Crisis
summary: The spin-off of the saga, launched less than three years ago, will cease operations before the release of the third installment of the remake.

title: More than 220,000 players ask Sony not to eliminate physical discs on PlayStation
summary: The community mobilizes against the possible disappearance of physical format, with figures like Snake supporting the protest.

title: Destiny 2 fans create a game to throw tomatoes at the car of Bungie's ex-CEO
summary: The community expresses its discontent with the end of Destiny 2 through a minigame that allows throwing tomatoes at Pete Parsons' car collection.

title: Bithell Games announces Vampirium 1997, an immersive vampire simulator in present-day England
summary: The studio behind Tron: Catalyst will release in early access a game where the King of England is a vampire.

title: Employees of Build a Rocket Boy protest against a fan event organized by their own studio
summary: Workers of the MindsEye studio demonstrate over working conditions and previous layoffs, while the company holds a paid event for fans.

title: Demo of 'Yoshi and the Mysterious Book' now available on Nintendo Switch 2
summary: Players can try the dinosaur's new adventure before its official launch.

title: The Crew Motorfest will arrive on Nintendo Switch 2 in October
summary: Ubisoft's open-world racing game will be available on Nintendo's new console from October 8.

title: The person behind the GTA Trilogy remaster admits they understand players' anger
summary: After almost five years of silence, the studio behind the disastrous release acknowledges that many players were unhappy but claims that there were also those who enjoyed the game.

title: Nintendo will remove Switch 1 from the European market due to battery law changes
summary: The original console will stop being sold in Europe due to new regulations on repair rights and batteries.

title: Palworld approaches 1.0 launch with a new player milestone
summary: Pocketpair confirms it will not raise the game's price and celebrates a large number of active players before the full launch.

title: Subnautica 2 gets its first major update that allows fighting back against fish
summary: Players can now stun marine creatures instead of just fleeing, in the biggest update since its launch.

title: Mortal Shell 2 confirms its release date for August 2026
summary: The anticipated soulslike will arrive on August 20 on all platforms, the studio has announced.

title: The werewolf love interest in Love and Deepspace could disappear permanently
summary: Controversy with the Chinese government suggests the character will be removed from the game forever.

title: Persona 4 Revival will remove homophobic content in its new version
summary: The producer confirms significant changes to characters to make the game more inclusive.

title: Minecraft finally adds the option to sit down after 17 years
summary: The update will allow players to sit on stairs and slabs, one of the most requested features by the community.

title: The Fallout series receives multiple Emmy nominations but the actors are left out
summary: The Prime Video adaptation gets nominations in technical categories, but the performers were not recognized.
